root_text.sn46.4:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ āyasmā sāriputto sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
root_text.sn46.4:1.2: Tatra kho āyasmā sāriputto bhikkhū āmantesi:
root_text.sn46.4:1.4: “Āvuso”ti kho te bhikkhū āyasmato sāriputtassa paccassosuṁ.
root_text.sn46.4:2.3: Satisambojjhaṅgo, dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pītisambojjhaṅgo, passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, samādhisambojjhaṅgo, upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo—
root_text.sn46.4:2.5: Imesaṁ khvāhaṁ, āvuso, sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgānaṁ yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi pubbaṇhasamayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena pubbaṇhasamayaṁ viharāmi;
root_text.sn46.4:2.6: yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ viharāmi;
root_text.sn46.4:2.7: yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi sāyanhasamayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena sāyanhasamayaṁ viharāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:2.8: Satisambojjhaṅgo iti ce me, āvuso, hoti, ‘appamāṇo’ti me hoti, ‘susamāraddho’ti me hoti, tiṭṭhantañca naṁ ‘tiṭṭhatī’ti pajānāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:2.9: Sacepi me cavati, ‘idappaccayā me cavatī’ti pajānāmi …pe…
root_text.sn46.4:2.10: upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo iti ce me, āvuso, hoti, ‘appamāṇo’ti me hoti, ‘susamāraddho’ti me hoti, tiṭṭhantañca naṁ ‘tiṭṭhatī’ti pajānāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:2.11: Sacepi me cavati, ‘idappaccayā me cavatī’ti pajānāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:3.1: Seyyathāpi, āvuso, rañño vā rājamahāmattassa vā nānārattānaṁ dussānaṁ dussakaraṇḍako pūro assa.
root_text.sn46.4:3.2: So yaññadeva dussayugaṁ ākaṅkheyya pubbaṇhasamayaṁ pārupituṁ, taṁ tadeva dussayugaṁ pubbaṇhasamayaṁ pārupeyya;
root_text.sn46.4:3.3: yaññadeva dussayugaṁ ākaṅkheyya majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ pārupituṁ, taṁ tadeva dussayugaṁ majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ pārupeyya;
root_text.sn46.4:3.4: yaññadeva dussayugaṁ ākaṅkheyya sāyanhasamayaṁ pārupituṁ, taṁ tadeva dussayugaṁ sāyanhasamayaṁ pārupeyya.
root_text.sn46.4:3.5: Evameva khvāhaṁ, āvuso, imesaṁ sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgānaṁ yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi pubbaṇhasamayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena pubbaṇhasamayaṁ viharāmi;
root_text.sn46.4:3.6: yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena majjhanhikaṁ samayaṁ viharāmi;
root_text.sn46.4:3.7: yena yena bojjhaṅgena ākaṅkhāmi sāyanhasamayaṁ viharituṁ, tena tena bojjhaṅgena sāyanhasamayaṁ viharāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:3.8: Satisambojjhaṅgo iti ce me, āvuso, hoti, ‘appamāṇo’ti me hoti, ‘susamāraddho’ti me hoti, tiṭṭhantañca naṁ ‘tiṭṭhatī’ti pajānāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:3.9: Sacepi me cavati, ‘idappaccayā me cavatī’ti pajānāmi …pe…
root_text.sn46.4:3.10: upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo iti ce me, āvuso, hoti, ‘appamāṇo’ti me hoti, ‘susamāraddho’ti me hoti, tiṭṭhantañca naṁ ‘tiṭṭhatī’ti pajānāmi.
root_text.sn46.4:3.11: Sacepi me cavati, ‘idappaccayā me cavatī’ti pajānāmī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.4:1.1: At one time Venerable Sāriputta was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.3: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.4: These are the seven awakening factors.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.5: In the morning, I meditate on whichever of these seven awakening factors I want.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.7: and in the evening, I meditate on whichever of these seven awakening factors I want.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.8: If it’s the awakening factor of mindfulness, I know that it’s limitless and that it’s properly implemented. While it remains I understand that it remains.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.9: And if it subsides in me I understand the specific reason it subsides. …
translation_text.sn46.4:2.10: If it’s the awakening factor of equanimity, I know that it’s limitless and that it’s properly implemented. While it remains I understand that it remains.
translation_text.sn46.4:2.11: And if it subsides I understand the specific reason it subsides.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.1: Suppose that a ruler or their chief minister had a chest full of garments of different colors.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.2: In the morning, they’d don whatever pair of garments they wanted.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.4: and in the evening, they’d don whatever pair of garments they wanted.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.5: In the same way, in the morning,
translation_text.sn46.4:3.7: and in the evening, I meditate on whichever of these seven awakening factors I want.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.8: If it’s the awakening factor of mindfulness, I know that it’s limitless and that it’s properly implemented. While it remains I understand that it remains.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.9: And if it subsides I understand the specific reason it subsides. …
translation_text.sn46.4:3.10: If it’s the awakening factor of equanimity, I know that it’s limitless and that it’s properly implemented. While it remains I understand that it remains.
translation_text.sn46.4:3.11: And if it subsides I understand the specific reason it subsides.”

reference_text.sn46.4:1.1: cck19.89, dr19.98, ms14S5_393, msdiv185, ndp15.67, pts-vp-pli5.71
